InstanceConfigurationBySpecifyingInstanc.action: Operation to perform on the instance. Current valid value: resize
InstanceConfigurationBySpecifyingInstanc.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters in length. See [link](#{clientToken}Idempotency Support) for details.
InstanceConfigurationBySpecifyingInstanc.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame for the instance. true: enable, false: disable. Defaults to null. When null: if resizing to a spec that does not support Jumbo Frame, Jumbo Frame is disabled; if resizing from a non-supporting spec to a supporting spec, Jumbo Frame is not enabled; if resizing between two supporting specs, the Jumbo Frame setting is preserved from before the resize.
